notice: 1.3.5 fixes windows in the HAP push: walls with a 2nd window (or several walls) now push correctly - the window quantities no longer drop to 0.
notes: 1.3.5 - fixes a HAP push bug where window quantities (especially a Window 2, or windows on a space with more than one wall) could be dropped to 0. The app now enters all wall areas first, then the constructions and window quantities, committing each value so HAP keeps them. Just click Update now.
